creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Matt from comment #7)
# Generate locale files
post-install-NLS-on:
	cd ${WRKSRC} && ${PYTHON_CMD} tools/make_mo.py

But where they installed? Maybe need ${COPYTREE_SHARE}? Or replace post-install-NLS-on with pre-install-NLS-on?
I can't see difference after build port with and without NLS option.
